svg.title: Complete Hoosier AI system v3
svg.desc: Owner dashboard and salesperson portal with stats and exception queue at top, lead pipeline with scoring and nurture branch, sales handoff with catalog and onboarding, client workspace with client comms and action buttons, infrastructure layer with skills delivery agents and QA, and background agents with referral loop at the bottom.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should be on the Tasks view of my owner dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What should the running agents view look like on my dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What metrics should be on my owner dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What does the exception queue track - failed agents, QA rejections, missed follow-ups, stuck deliverables?')
sendPrompt('How should the salesperson see their lead queue?')
sendPrompt('What should be in the per-lead sales brief?')
sendPrompt('How should the salesperson capture call outcomes?')
sendPrompt('What stats should the salesperson see - their conversion rate, lead velocity, calls per day?')
sendPrompt('How should lead scraping work per category?')
sendPrompt('How should leads get scored by fit?')
sendPrompt('How should the categorized lead DB be structured?')
sendPrompt('How should personalized outreach work per category?')
sendPrompt('How should the nurture track work for non-responsive leads - drip cadence, re-scoring, automatic re-engagement?')
sendPrompt('What does the per-client project link include?')
sendPrompt('What captures full client history - calls, emails, decisions, deliverable revs?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the decisions and deliverables log?')
sendPrompt('How does the client communication layer work - status updates, ready-to-review emails, milestone pings?')
sendPrompt('What does the Build website action button do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Research AI button do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Build ads button do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Build AI OS button do?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the AI fit research skill?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the website builds skill?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the ad campaigns skill?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the AI OS builds skill?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the AI agent builds skill?')
sendPrompt('How does the website builder agent work?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI researcher agent work?')
sendPrompt('How does the ad creator agent work?')
sendPrompt('How does the AIOS designer agent work?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent builder agent work?')
sendPrompt('What does the brand voice QA check do?')
sendPrompt('What does the factual accuracy check do?')
sendPrompt('What does the polish pass do?')
sendPrompt('How does the enrichment agent auto-fill lead and client context?')
sendPrompt('How does the categorize agent auto-sort items?')
sendPrompt('How does the learning agent tune outreach copy and skills from outcomes?')
sendPrompt('How does the monitor agent flag stale leads and stuck deliverables?')
sendPrompt('How does the case study extractor generate marketing from completed projects?')
sendPrompt('How does the referrals agent capture happy-client referrals and loop them back into the lead pipeline?')
